note: Engine consumers may use 'expected_effects' as soft hints when computing event salience and prior shocks. Validators should reject unknown event_type keys (PRD §8.2).

items.label: Protest
items.definition: A coordinated public gathering to express grievance or demand a policy outcome. Visible to the public and to officials.

items.label: Public Statement
items.definition: An on-the-record verbal or written declaration by an actor (often a hero or institution) outlining a position.

items.label: Leak / Disclosure
items.definition: Unauthorized release of internal documents, communications, or recordings that contradicts an official narrative.

items.label: Crackdown / Enforcement Action
items.definition: A coercive enforcement action by state or institutional actors (arrests, dispersal, suspensions) directed at protest, organizing, or speech.

items.label: Public Apology
items.definition: A formal acknowledgment of fault by an actor, optionally including remediation commitments.

items.label: Policy Vote / Legislative Action
items.definition: A formal vote or rule-making action by a legislative body, regulator, or governance institution that changes policy.

items.label: Rally / Supportive Gathering
items.definition: A planned in-person event organized to mobilize supporters, build morale, and signal strength to opponents and media.

items.label: Strike / Work Stoppage
items.definition: Coordinated withdrawal of labor by a workforce to impose economic cost in service of demands.

items.label: Press Release
items.definition: Official outbound communication from an institution to news channels intended to seed coverage on the institution's terms.

items.label: Court Ruling
items.definition: A judicial decision (injunction, verdict, opinion) that changes the legal landscape relevant to the dispute.

items.label: Public Hearing / Inquiry
items.definition: A scheduled public proceeding where testimony is taken and contested questions are aired in front of an official body.

items.label: Viral Social Post
items.definition: A single social-media post whose reach has crossed the channel's viral threshold and is now driving cross-channel attention.

items.label: Formal Investigation
items.definition: An official, named investigation opened by a regulator, prosecutor, or oversight body into the conduct of an actor.

items.label: Open / Public Letter
items.definition: A signed open letter from a coalition of named individuals or organizations articulating a shared position.
